verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The universe is at your feet Gives You praise evermore The stars will light the sky for You And always God be praised

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And we sing, the Lord is on high The Lord is on high

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I adore You, I adore You And there's nothing compared To Your majesty, Oh Lord I adore You, I adore You And I stand in the wonder of Your love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We will crown Him Lord forever Living Saviour, Jesus Redeemer Lord in heaven, robed in majesty Crowned in glory, creation adores You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Holy, holy, Lord almighty And forever, the Lord is exalted Hear the angels shout His anthem

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And we sing, the Lord is on high The Lord is on high

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I adore You, I adore You And there's nothing compared To Your majesty, Oh Lord I adore You, I adore You And I stand in the wonder of Your love
